concerns.text: The plan references FR‑017 for the COD dataset source URL, but the actual URL is not provided (the spec shows a placeholder '`)'`). A concrete, reachable COD download URL must be cited to satisfy Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy).

The plan mentions using a frozen pre‑trained SMILES‑Transformer but does not cite the source (e.g., paper, model repository, or URL). The transformer model is an external data resource and must be referenced to meet the verified‑accuracy requirement.
